# Dungeon Crawler Carl — Rules Pack

This world runs on the generic d20-vs-DC core. Progression is **resource-axis**:
standing rises with **viewer count** (and floor descent), NOT a D&D 5e XP-to-20 track.

The systems that make this world feel like DCC — loot boxes, the 847M-viewer
audience, the Odette interviews — live in `campaign-overview.json` under
`campaign_rules`. Follow those exactly during play.
